case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF S.F./TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS PEREZ, ZULMA

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, ZULMA
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-21-2006, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, ZULMA DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS EXPIRED AT THE TIME OF FILING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF S.F./TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, ZULMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-27-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-17-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING. SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER REOBERTO PARINAS ORDERED TO APPEAR.
